mime_sniffing.description: MIME type sniffing -- browser ignores Content-Type and sniffs content as executable type (HTML/JS)

probes.description: HTML content in non-HTML response -- if uploaded/reflected content renders as HTML despite non-HTML Content-Type, MIME sniffing is active
Check X-Content-Type-Options header -- missing nosniff allows browser MIME sniffing on responses

content_type_mismatch.description: Content-Type mismatch exploitation -- server returns wrong Content-Type allowing XSS in uploaded files or API responses

probes.description: JSONP callback injection -- if response wraps data in callback function with text/javascript Content-Type, arbitrary JS execution possible
SVG served as image -- SVG files containing script tags served with image/svg+xml execute JavaScript in browser

polyglot.description: Polyglot file attacks -- files valid as multiple types simultaneously (e.g., valid JPEG + valid JS)

probes.description: GIF/JS polyglot -- file passes GIF magic byte validation but executes as JavaScript when loaded via script tag
PDF polyglot probe -- if uploaded file served inline with permissive Content-Type, PDF features (FormCalc) can exfiltrate data
